about.title: About
about.p1: Zorya Tech Studio is an independent mobile development studio. We build apps that combine thoughtful design with solid engineering.
about.p2: Our goal is to create useful everyday tools with attention to detail and user experience.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: What we're working on
projects.empty: Projects are in development. Stay tuned!

senso.name: Senso
senso.subtitle: Smart sensors in your pocket
senso.desc_short: An Android measurement toolkit: level, lux meter, decibel meter, compass. All calculations run on-device.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Zorya Tech Studio ("we", "us", "our") built the Senso app — a measurement toolkit for Android. This Privacy Policy explains how we handle information when you use the app.
privacy.collect_text: We do not collect any personal data. The app requires no registration, account, or sign-in. We do not request or store your name, email, phone number, or any other personally identifiable information.
privacy.storage_text: All measurements, settings, and calibrations are stored exclusively on your device (SharedPreferences for settings, SQLite for measurement history). No data is transmitted to our servers — we do not operate any server infrastructure for storing user data.
privacy.permissions_text: Senso uses device sensors strictly for in-app, real-time calculations. All raw data stays in memory and is not transmitted anywhere:
privacy.permissions_mic: Microphone — used by the Decibel Meter to measure sound level. Audio is analysed frame-by-frame (RMS, A-weighting) and never recorded.
privacy.permissions_camera: Camera — used by the Camera Level mode (horizon overlay) and by the Camera fallback mode in the Lux Meter (frame brightness estimation). Frames are not stored or transmitted.
privacy.permissions_location: Location — used to compute magnetic declination (True North) in the Compass via the WMM-2025 model. Coordinates are used once for the math and not transmitted anywhere.
privacy.third_text: Senso displays ads via Google AdMob (a banner on the Settings and History screens, and a full-screen interstitial between tools). AdMob may collect device identifiers, IP address, and usage data per its own policy:
privacy.third_admob: displays ads. May collect device identifiers, IP address, and usage data for serving personalized or non-personalized ads.
privacy.children_text: Senso is not directed at children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect information from children under 13. If you believe your child has provided us with any information, please contact us and we will delete it.
privacy.changes_text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated effective date.
privacy.contact_text: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

movogra.name: МовоГра UA
movogra.subtitle: Improve your Ukrainian by playing
movogra.desc_short: A mobile quiz app for practicing Ukrainian language. 9 categories, 1040+ questions with explanations.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Zorya Tech Studio ("we", "us", "our") built the МовоГра UA app. This Privacy Policy explains how we handle information when you use our app.
privacy.collect_text: We do not collect any personal data. The app does not require registration, account creation, or sign-in. We do not request or store your name, email address, phone number, or any other personally identifiable information.
privacy.storage_text: All progress and settings are stored exclusively on your device using SharedPreferences. No data is transmitted to our servers. We do not operate any server infrastructure for storing user data.
privacy.third_text: Our app uses the following third-party services that may collect certain information in accordance with their own privacy policies:
privacy.third_admob: displays ads (banner and interstitial). May collect device identifiers and data for ad serving.
privacy.third_firebase: collects anonymous usage statistics (app opens, screen views, device type).
privacy.children_text: This app is not directed at children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect information from children under 13. If you believe your child has provided us with any information, please contact us and we will delete it.
privacy.changes_text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated effective date.
privacy.contact_text: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Zorya Tech Studio ("we", "us", "our") respects your privacy. This policy describes how we collect, use, and protect your information when using our mobile applications.
privacy.collect_text: Our apps do not require registration and do not collect personal information directly. However, our apps use third-party services that may automatically collect certain data:
privacy.collect_firebase_text: Collects anonymous usage data such as app opens, screen views, session duration, device model, OS version, country, and language. This data is used to understand how users interact with our apps and to improve functionality. No personally identifiable information is collected.
privacy.collect_admob_text: Displays ads within our apps. AdMob may collect device identifiers, IP address, and usage data to serve personalized or non-personalized ads. You can opt out of personalized ads in your device settings.
privacy.use_text: We use analytics data solely to improve app quality, fix bugs, and understand general usage patterns. We do not sell, trade, or transfer your data to outside parties.
privacy.third_text: Our apps use the following third-party services that have their own privacy policies:
privacy.third_firebase: Firebase Analytics — Google Privacy Policy: https://policies.google.com/privacy
privacy.security_text: We take reasonable measures to protect your information, but no method of transmission over the Internet is completely secure.
privacy.changes_text: We may update this policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated date.
privacy.contact_text: If you have questions about this privacy policy, contact us at:
